treasure.name: Mauer Laboratory Cache
treasure.description: Rare reagents, notes, and silver apparatus salvaged from the laboratory.

treasure.name: Resonator Fragment
treasure.description: A final component or attunement note that clarifies how the Resonator relates to Avacyn's rescue.

treasure.name: Storm Conductor Rod
treasure.description: A metal rod etched with alchemical glyphs used to channel lightning into the tower.
